messages.content: 换一下句式：Reducing the metal particles leads to a sharp decrease in the fraction of terrace sites and an increase in the fraction of step/corner sites.
A sharp decrease in the fraction of terrace sites and an increase in the fraction of step/corner sites is observed when the metal particles are reduced.
语法检查：A sharp decrease in the fraction of terrace sites and an increase in the fraction of step/corner sites is observed when the metal particle size are reduced.
语法正确，但是要根据语境来确定是不是要用"size"这个词。如果上下文提到了metal particle size，那么这个句子是正确的。如果没有提到，就应该省略size。
are对么
如果上下文中确实强调了是多个metal particles的大小变化，那么are是正确的。但是如果只讨论单个metal particle的情况，应该使用is。
size还是sizes
取决于上下文，如果指的是多种不同大小的金属粉末，则应该用sizes（复数），如果只是指一种金属粉末，则应该用size（单数）。
语法检查：A sharp decrease in the fraction of terrace sites and an increase in the fraction of step/corner sites is observed when the metal particle size is reduced.
句子语法正确，表达清晰。
reported换换：Yang et al.[19] reported that smaller particles with a higher fraction of low-coordinated atoms tend to promote deoxygenation and hydrogenation reactions
It has been reported by Yang et al. [19] that smaller particles with a higher fraction of low-coordinated atoms tend to promote deoxygenation and hydrogenation reactions.
reported可以换成什么
"reported"可以换成"stated"、"disclosed"、"claimed"、"revealed"、"asserted"等。
变句式：All the materials used in the experiments without further treatment.
No further treatment was given to any of the materials used in the experiments.
修改句式：The Ni/SAPO-11 catalysts were prepared as follows: SAPO-11 was immersed in aqueous solutions of Ni(NO3)2·6H2O.
The preparation of Ni/SAPO-11 catalysts involved immersing SAPO-11 in aqueous solutions of Ni(NO3)2·6H2O.
修改句式：The turnover frequency (TOF) per acid site, labeled as TOFn-C6, was calculated using the following equation
Using the following equation, the turnover frequency per acid site, which was labeled as TOFn-C6, was calculated.
学术一些

1. 学术写作应该清晰、简洁，使用准确的术语和表达方式。

2. 不应抄袭他人的研究成果，需要注明引用来源。

3. 避免使用口语化的表达方式，例如缩略语、俚语等。

4. 注意文献资料的正确引用格式，包括文献的作者、题目、出版日期、期刊、页码等信息。

5. 重视数据的分析与统计，确保结果的正确性和可靠性。

6. 适当使用图表和表格，清晰明了地呈现研究成果和数据。

7. 遵循学术规范和道德标准，尊重学术原则，尊重推论结论。

8. 认真完成审稿人和编辑人的建议和指示，对稿件进行必要的修改和改进。

9. 简洁明了的摘要、清晰准确的方法、成果和结论部分是优秀学术论文的必备元素。

10. 学术论文应该具有原始性、独创性和实用性，为学术界和社会做出贡献。
英文降重：The turnover frequency (TOF) per acid site, labeled as TOFn-C6, was calculated using the following equation
TOFn-C6, which indicates the turnover frequency per acid site, was computed via the equation below.

英文重写：the decrease in BET surface area and pore volume of the Ni/SAPO-11 catalysts was attributed to the attack of solvent molecules to the framework, as well as the blocking effect of metal species on the pores of the molecular sieve

The reduction of the BET surface area and pore volume of the Ni/SAPO-11 catalysts was explained by the impact of solvent molecules on the framework, as well as the obstruction caused by metal species within the molecular sieve's pores.
英文降重：which can be evidenced by the latter discussion.
This is supported by later discussion.
